pr.title: [non-record track] BankLinear: cross-layer shared weight bank

output.summary: BankLinear builds each QKV layer by mixing channel-modulated coefficients over a shared bank of learned bases, replacing per-layer weights with compositional synthesis.
techniques: - BankLinear mixes shared learned bases to synthesize per-layer QKV weights
- Channel-wise modulation lets each layer adapt coefficient mixtures without distinct matrices
